constructors.name: Polyhedron3D(polyhedronType, verticesCount, edgesCount, facesCount, negativeOrientation)
constructors.summary: Constructor The "Count" parameters have sense only for appropriate polyhedron type and specified a memory allocation size - performance optimization. In case of any error, constructor throw an exception.
constructors.remarks: Constructor The "Count" parameters have sense only for appropriate polyhedron type and specified a memory allocation size - performance optimization. In case of any error, constructor throw an exception.

params.name: polyhedronType
params.doc: Polyhedron type - edges, faces or volume.

methods.summary: Clear all vertices, edges and faces The "Count" parameters have sense only for appropriate polyhedron type and specified a memory allocation size - performance optimization. In case of any error, constructor throw an exception.
methods.remarks: Clear all vertices, edges and faces The "Count" parameters have sense only for appropriate polyhedron type and specified a memory allocation size - performance optimization. In case of any error, constructor throw an exception.

methods.remarks: static constructor for cuboid

params.name: p1
params.doc: lower point of min/max box that states the cuboid's size

params.doc: lower point of min/max box that states the cuboid's size

methods.summary: static constructor for cuboid
methods.remarks: static constructor for cuboid

params.name: box
params.doc: min/max box that states the cuboid's size

methods.remarks: Get edge at the specified position

methods.summary: Get edge at the specified position with orientation
methods.remarks: Get edge at the specified position with orientation

methods.name: AppendEdge
methods.summary: Append edge Method throw exception if object is not initialized. Old interface: appendPolyederEdge
methods.remarks: Append edge Method throw exception if object is not initialized. Old interface: appendPolyederEdge

methods.name: CreateFace
methods.summary: Create face and append it to polyhedron Method throw exception if object is not initialized. Old interface: appendPolyederFace
methods.remarks: Create face and append it to polyhedron Method throw exception if object is not initialized. Old interface: appendPolyederFace

methods.name: DeleteEdge
methods.summary: Delete edge Method throw exception if object is not initialized. Old interface: deletePolyederEdge
methods.remarks: Delete edge Method throw exception if object is not initialized. Old interface: deletePolyederEdge

methods.name: DeleteFace
methods.summary: Delete face at specified position Method throw exception in case of any error. Old interface: deleteFace
methods.remarks: Delete face at specified position Method throw exception in case of any error. Old interface: deleteFace

params.name: faceIndex
params.doc: Position of the deleted face. Zero based.

methods.name: DeleteFaces
methods.summary: Delete faces at specified positions Method throw exception in case of any error. Old interface: deleteFace
methods.remarks: Delete faces at specified positions Method throw exception in case of any error. Old interface: deleteFace

params.name: faceIndices
params.doc: Positions of the deleted faces. Zero based.

methods.name: EqualRef
methods.summary: Test for equal reference point
methods.remarks: Test for equal reference point

returns.doc: True when both polyhedrons has the same reference point.

methods.name: GetEdgeVertices
methods.summary: Get points on specified edge from specified face Method throw exception in case of any error.
methods.remarks: Get points on specified edge from specified face Method throw exception in case of any error.

methods.remarks: Get copy of all edges Old interface: getPolyederAllEdges

methods.remarks: Get count of edges Method throw exception in case of any error. Count

methods.summary: Set polyhedron on reference point. Polyhedron is in world coordinate system
methods.remarks: Set polyhedron on reference point. Polyhedron is in world coordinate system

params.name: polyhedronWorld
params.doc: Polyhedron with vertices in World coordinate system.

methods.name: SetRefPoint
methods.summary: Set the reference point Be aware: All vertices will be recalculated on new reference point. This operation is very slow in case of many vertices. Use constructor for better and faster initialization object.
methods.remarks: Set the reference point Be aware: All vertices will be recalculated on new reference point. This operation is very slow in case of many vertices. Use constructor for better and faster initialization object.

methods.name: SetType
methods.summary: Get polyhedron type Method throw exception if polyhedron is not initialized. In case of incorrect polyhedronType, tEdges type will be set.
methods.remarks: Get polyhedron type Method throw exception if polyhedron is not initialized. In case of incorrect polyhedronType, tEdges type will be set.

methods.name: WriteToStream
methods.summary: Write Polyhedron3D to the stream
methods.remarks: Write Polyhedron3D to the stream

methods.name: __eq__
methods.summary: Comparison of polyhedrons without tolerance. Be careful, this method work without tolerance!
methods.remarks: Comparison of polyhedrons without tolerance. Be careful, this method work without tolerance!

returns.doc: True when polyhedrons are equal, otherwise false.

methods.name: __getitem__
methods.summary: Get vertex at the specified position from index. Used world coordinates Operator throw exception in case of any error.
methods.remarks: Get vertex at the specified position from index. Used world coordinates Operator throw exception in case of any error.

properties.name: RefPoint
properties.summary: Get the reference point Be aware: All vertices will be recalculated on new reference point. This operation is very slow in case of many vertices. Use constructor for better and faster initialization object.

properties.name: Type
properties.summary: Get polyhedron type In case of error, method return tEdges. Get polyhedron type Method throw exception if polyhedron is not initialized. In case of incorrect polyhedronType, tEdges type will be set.
